news.t: We need fresh water to survive. Let's tap centuries-tested Indigenous ideas for protecting this life source.

holdings.infoBox: AQWA is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are American Water Works Company stock at 8.20%, Ferguson Enterprises at 7.70%, Xylem at 7.54%, Pentair at 6.32%, and United Utilities Group at 6.15%.

overview.description: The Global X Clean Water ETF (AQWA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global companies that are efficient in treating, purifying, and managing water. AQWA was launched on Apr 8, 2021 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Solactive Global Clean Water Industry Index
